zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore於大約1231年出生在威爾士拉德諾斯爾時，他的父親Ralph Mortimer11229歲，母親Gwladys ferch Llywelyn27歲。他於大約1247年與Maud de Braose結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在英國賀福爾維格莫 卡素被列為wigmore castle, hertfordshire england 。他去世於1282年10月30日在英國賀福爾維格莫享年52歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾維格莫維格莫 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore was born about 1231, in Radnorshire, Wales, his father, Ralph Mortimer, was 11229 and his mother, Gwladys ferch Llywelyn, was 27. He married Maud de Braose about 1247. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as wigmore castle, hertfordshire england  in Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, England. He died on 30 October 1282, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

fr.Chirk, Wrexham, Wales, United Kingdom: Chirk, Wrexham, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore est né environ 1231, à Radnorshire, Galles, son père, Ralph Mortimer, avait 11229 ans et sa mère, Gwladys ferch Llywelyn, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Braose environ 1247. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est wigmore castle, hertfordshire england  à Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 30 octobre 1282, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore um 1231 in Radnorshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Mortimer 11229 und seine Mutter Gwladys ferch Llywelyn 27. Er hat um 1247 Maud de Braose geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als wigmore castle, hertfordshire england  in Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 30. Oktober 1282 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England und wurde in Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore è nato il circa 1231 nel Radnorshire, Galles, il suo padre, Ralph Mortimer, aveva 11229 anni e il suo madre, Gwladys ferch Llywelyn, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Maud de Braose circa 1247. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come wigmore castle, hertfordshire england  nel Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, England. Morì il 30 ottobre 1282, nel Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmoreが約1231年にウェールズラドノーシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ralph Mortimerは11229歳，母Gwladys ferch Llywelynは27歳であった。約1247年にMaud de Braoseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモー カストルでの職業はwigmore castle, hertfordshire england と記録されている。彼は1282年10月30日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーで52歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーウィグモー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore(이)가 대략 1231년 웨일스 라드노르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Mortimer(은)는 11229세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwladys ferch Llywelyn(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1247년 Maud de Braose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어 카스틀에서 wigmore castle, hertfordshire england 이었다. 그는 1282년 10월 30일 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어 위그모어 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore nasceu aproximadamente 1231, em Radnorshire, Gales, seu pai, Ralph Mortimer, tinha 11229 anos e sua mãe, Gwladys ferch Llywelyn, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Braose aproximadamente 1247. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como wigmore castle, hertfordshire england  em Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 30 de outubro de 1282, em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore родился около 1231 г. в местности радноршир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Ralph Mortimer было 11229 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwladys ferch Llywelyn, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Braose около 1247 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии wigmore castle, hertfordshire england  в местности вигмор кастл, хирефордшир, Англия. Он умер 30 октября 1282 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности вигмор эбби, вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore nació aproximadamente 1231, en Radnorshire, Gales, su papá, Ralph Mortimer, tenía 11229 años y su mamá, Gwladys ferch Llywelyn, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Maud de Braose aproximadamente 1247. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era wigmore castle, hertfordshire england  en Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 30 de octubre de 1282, en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
